chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D- 4147 of 2023 _________________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE __________________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 19095/23. 2. For hearing of main case. -------------- 30.10.2024. None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Sardar Zafar Hussain holding brief for Mr. Aamir Raza, Advocate for Respondent. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. ----------------- None present on behalf of the Petitioner nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing; whereas, even otherwise, perusal of the prayer clause reflects that this petition has now become infructuous. Be that as it may, since no one has turned up today as well as on the last date of hearing, therefore, this petition is dismissed for non- prosecution with pending applications. J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
